title: Contraception counseling
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Defines method-specific examination and test classification, preserves medical eligibility as a separate assessment, and supports pregnancy-status review before method initiation.
examination.rationale: Preserves method-specific examination, eligibility and pregnancy qualifiers.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Goals, pregnancy possibility, history, medicines, contraindications, preferences, consent and method are absent.
No method, eligibility, prescription, procedure or follow-up is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
